title: coelanthum semiquinquefidum
intro: Coelanthum semiquinquefidum is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, commonly known as the five-lobed saxifrage. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coelanthum semiquinquefidum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
